mapper.select: SELECT t.id AS trip_id, #{userId} AS user_id, t.status AS trip_status, m.status AS member_status, t.owner_user_id AS owner_user_id FROM trip.trips t LEFT JOIN trip.trip_members m ON m.trip_id = t.id AND m.user_id = #{userId} WHERE t.id = #{tripId}

SELECT id, owner_user_id, title, display_destination, status, itinerary_version, retripped_from_post_id, retripped_from_snapshot_version, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM trip.trips WHERE id = #{tripId}

SELECT t.id, t.owner_user_id, t.title, t.display_destination, t.status, t.itinerary_version, t.retripped_from_post_id, t.retripped_from_snapshot_version, t.created_at, t.updated_at, t.deleted_at
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT i.id, i.trip_id, i.invite_code, i.invitee_user_id, i.status, i.expires_at, t.owner_user_id, t.status AS trip_status FROM trip.trip_invites i JOIN trip.trips t ON t.id = i.trip_id WHERE i.invite_code = #{inviteCode} ORDER BY i.created_at DESC, i.id DESC LIMIT 1
